request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl https://api.openai.com/v1/responses \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $OPENAI_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "model": "gpt-5-mini",
    "input": "beli kopi 30 ribu dari dompet"
  }'
